items.title: scikit-learn confusion matrix documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Official definition: rows = true labels, columns = predicted labels; multiclass and normalization options.

items.title: Classification metrics (scikit-learn user guide)
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Links confusion-matrix counts to precision, recall, F1, and classification_report.

items.title: An Introduction to ROC Analysis (Fawcett, 2006)
items.author: Tom Fawcett
items.note: Connects threshold sweeps to confusion-matrix-derived TPR and FPR — companion reading to ROC-AUC topic.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Standard reference for classification error rates and evaluation practice in supervised learning.
